---

- [ ] US1 — Capture richer attribution for verification-focused reruns: persist raw workflow-start and baseline prompt-surface metadata.
- [ ] US2 — Run a targeted verification confirmation batch: produce a machine-readable summary and debrief for the verification-focused rerun.
- [ ] US3 — Gate the full rerun on verification-family neutrality: record whether to proceed, hold, or stop-and-recalibrate.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH7-verification-calibrated-audit-kickoff/epics/E3-verification-rerun-attribution-and-gate/stories/`
